mapper.select: SELECT rq.id, rq.book_id, rq.reader_id, rq.request_date, rq.due_days, rq.status, rq.approve_date, rq.admin_id, rq.admin_remark, rq.reader_remark, rq.borrow_id, b.name AS book_name, r.name AS reader_name, au.username AS admin_name FROM borrow_request rq LEFT JOIN book b ON rq.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON rq.reader_id = r.id LEFT JOIN `user` au ON rq.admin_id = au.id WHERE rq.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_request (book_id, reader_id, request_date, due_days, status, reader_remark) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{readerId}, #{requestDate}, #{dueDays}, #{status}, #{readerRemark})
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_request WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_request WHERE status = 'PENDING'
